title: Michael
bodyText: The little myconid the party saved from the gelatinous cube (S10) — [[kenas-grove|the grove]]'s "child." Guided them to [[kennarea|Kena]]'s gates (S14), traveled with them after ("I may be different after we go in there. But… thank you for helping me."), communicates via spore-snorts. [[cumb]]'s buddy. Not on the S24 roster — presumably back at the grove or in [[koviz]]; record it.
